notes.purpose: Policy file for the KswordARKDriver IOCTL static auditor.
notes.allowedAnyAccess: Add a full IOCTL_KSWORD_ARK_* name here only when FILE_ANY_ACCESS is intentional and documented.
notes.mutatingKeywords: Tokens that usually indicate state-changing or destructive operations and should not stay FILE_ANY_ACCESS by default.
notes.queryKeywords: Tokens that usually indicate read-only/query operations and should not require FILE_WRITE_ACCESS unless there is a documented reason.
notes.ignoredHeaders: Use repository-relative paths or basenames for generated/legacy headers that should be skipped.
